positives: Continuous coverage from 2020 through 2024 with no lapses
Most recent three policy years (2022-2024) with no cancellations
concerns: Prior cancellation in 2022 with Zurich Insurance Group
Frequent carrier changes over the 5-year period (4 different carriers)
Elevated claim frequency in 2021 (15 claims) and 2024 (13 claims)
risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: 5-year loss history shows 48 total claims across four different carriers: 13 claims in 2024 (Nationwide), 10 claims in 2023 (Berkshire Hathaway Guard), 4 claims in 2022 (Zurich - cancelled), 15 claims in 2021 (Nationwide), and 6 claims in 2020 (CNA). Loss ratios were not provided. Total premium over 5 years: approximately $7,549,116.

extracted_text_sections.claims_narrative: Prior insurance history reflects five consecutive years of coverage (2020-2024) with four different carriers. Claim counts by year: 2020 - 6, 2021 - 15, 2022 - 4, 2023 - 10, 2024 - 13. The 2022 Zurich Insurance Group policy was cancelled; all other policy years indicate no cancellation. Loss ratio data was not populated.
